title: Archmap project configuration
description: Schema for .archmap.json — per-project configuration for the archmap Claude Code plugin. Drop one in your project root. All fields are optional; every field has a sensible default.

exclude.description: Paths or globs the explorer agent skips during codebase exploration. Examples: node_modules, dist, vendor, .git.

tiers.description: Path-prefix → tier overrides. Keys are path prefixes (e.g. 'src/api/'); values are tier keys from the fixed vocabulary.

pinned.description: Module IDs that /archmap:repair must never remove or re-tier, even if the repair agent suggests changes.

html.description: Where /archmap writes the interactive HTML map. Hooks read this path to detect staleness.

theme.description: Default theme applied when the HTML map opens for the first time.

sessionStart.description: Set to false to silence the session-start staleness nudge.

respectOverrides.description: When true (default), /archmap reads the layout-override file and preserves user-arranged module positions.

overridePath.description: Path to the layout-override file produced by the HTML UI's Save button.
